title: Controlled in-context-technique lift on cryo fault classification
note_small_n: n=24 held-out; a 200-scenario confirmation of the few-shot+SC run is the next step

zero_shot_agent.mode: prompt only, no examples, single sample

mechanism: all zero-shot errors were engineered confusable-pair confusions; contrastive few-shot demos + self-consistency voting fixed exactly those

techniques.contrastive_few_shot: curated labeled demos over-weighting confusable pairs; curated (not many-shot, which degrades on reasoning: arXiv:2605.13511)
techniques.self_consistency: sample Diagnostician N=3, majority-vote fault_class (Wang et al. arXiv:2203.11171; +2.2% & best cost/acc vs self-refine which hurts, arXiv:2604.22273; arXiv:2502.02533)
techniques.deliberately_avoided: multi-round debate (gains are a compute artifact, arXiv:2606.13003) and self-refine loops (hurt accuracy, arXiv:2604.22273)
